trading.title: Trading
trading.setup_desc: STREAK runs on your own VPS for maximum security — your private key never leaves your server.
trading.setup_step2: 2. SSH into the server and run this one command:
trading.setup_step3: 3. Open the dashboard URL shown at the end and connect your wallet
trading.preset_low_desc: Buy at 10¢, sell at 15¢. Higher risk, low entry.
trading.preset_lead_desc: Buy leading side ≥ 70¢, hold to expiry. Backtest +12.8% ROI.
trading.auto_desc: Our central bot trades the BTC 5-min market on your behalf. 1 token per cycle.
trading.need_tokens: Get more tokens to keep trading
trading.wallet_none: No wallet connected — bot can't trade for you
trading.wallet_warn_1: Only fund this wallet with the amount you're willing to risk.
trading.wallet_warn_2: Your private key is encrypted and stored on our server. Server breach = loss risk.
trading.wallet_warn_3: Use a NEW wallet, not your main one. Recommended starting balance: $20–50 USDC.
trading.wallet_warn_4: USDC must be on Polygon network. Approve Polymarket allowance separately.
trading.token_used_msg: 1 token = 1 trade attempt (consumed even on failure)
trading.advanced_hint: All parameters editable. Defaults are conservative low-target.
trading.p_entry_mode_low: Low Target — buy at low price (10¢)
trading.pk_form_warn1: Your private key stays in YOUR browser only. The server uses it transiently per trade and never stores it.
trading.pk_form_warn2: Use a NEW wallet funded only with what you can lose. Keep your main wallet safe.
trading.pk_form_warn3: USDC must be on Polygon. Set Polymarket allowance once via app.polymarket.com.
trading.live_loop_running: Strategy loop running in your browser
trading.tab_warning: ⚠ Bot runs only while this tab is open

safety.title: Your keys, your funds
safety.subtitle: STREAK never stores your private key or holds your USDC.
safety.p1_title: Private key stays in your browser
safety.p1_desc: We use stateless execution. Your key is sent over HTTPS to sign one trade, then released from server memory. Never written to disk, database, or logs.
safety.p2_desc: Your USDC is on Polygon, in your own wallet. STREAK only places orders — never holds, transfers, or withdraws your money.
safety.p3_desc: All execution code is public on GitHub. Anyone can verify the no-storage guarantee.
safety.p4_desc: Trades are stored only in your browser localStorage. Nothing on our server.

disclaimer.title: Risk Disclaimer
disclaimer.short: Trading prediction markets involves risk. Past results do not guarantee future returns.
disclaimer.p1: STREAK is a software tool, not an investment advisor or broker. We do not give financial advice.
disclaimer.p2: Polymarket is a regulated/restricted product in many jurisdictions including the United States. You are responsible for confirming that using it is legal where you live.
disclaimer.p3: Automated trading can lose money quickly. You may lose all USDC in your trading wallet. Only trade with funds you can afford to lose.
disclaimer.p4: Backtest results, win rates, and example returns are historical. They are NOT a promise of future performance.
disclaimer.p5: STREAK is provided AS IS, with no warranty. We are not liable for any trading losses, slippage, missed exits, downtime, blockchain failures, Polymarket outages, or wallet-key compromise on your device.
disclaimer.p6: By using STREAK you accept full responsibility for every order placed. The strategy parameters and the decision to start the bot are yours alone.
disclaimer.agree: I understand and accept the risks
disclaimer.disagreed_msg: Please accept the risk disclaimer to start the bot
disclaimer.footer_short: STREAK is non-custodial software. Trading involves risk of loss. Not financial advice.

auth.by_signing: By signing, you agree to our Terms of Use
auth.choose_desc: Anonymous is fastest, Google saves your account

landing.hero_sub: Every five minutes, the bot reads the BTC market, takes a position, and exits. It runs while you sleep.
landing.cta_note: 10 free tokens on signup · No card required
landing.how_1_desc: Google or anonymous. 10 tokens on signup.
landing.how_2_desc: Defaults work. First trade fires within 5 minutes.
landing.how_3_desc: Share your code for extra tokens.
landing.diff_a_desc: Your private key never reaches our servers.
landing.diff_b_desc: Chainlink, Binance, and Bybit cross-checked to block oracle drift.
landing.diff_c_desc: +20 tokens per direct invite, +10 when they invite someone too.
landing.risk_note: Trading involves loss of capital. Polymarket is restricted in some jurisdictions.
